iterations.changes: Initial rewrite: added orientation phase, issue taxonomy with concrete patterns, structured output template with severity/category/location/evidence/fix/effort, severity scale, guidelines. Rebug: added 5-step investigation methodology, verdict taxonomy, structured output template.
iterations.notes: New pipeline 27% faster. Rebug verdict taxonomy enforced consistently. Old pipeline had confused AssertionError analysis.

iterations.changes: No skill changes from iteration 1. Ground truth eval on synthetic repo with 28 planted issues.
iterations.notes: Both pipelines found 27/28 planted issues (missed SEC-16: error context logging). Both had 0 false positives. Current pipeline 7% faster. Both rebug runs confirmed all findings. New skill rebug used consistent verdict taxonomy; old skill rebug used ad-hoc labels and had verbose confused reasoning on some findings.
iterations.verdict: commit — recall/precision parity, structural improvements from iteration 1 validated on new target
